race.comment: LA PROFECIA (4) hasn't been too far away in all three career outings to date and has been well in the betting on all three occasions. Will be better with that first-up effort now in the locker and where there's smoke there's fire. Rates the testing material against this line-up after a couple of key scratchings. THRASH A BULLY (10) has placed over this distance range and will be rock-hard fit for this. Top-three credentials. KUIA MA (3) resumes but has tuned up for this with a recent trial placing and can run a bold race while fresh. BOWLING HARRY (2) next best at odds in a race with only a handful of chances.
